title: Mlum Mod
description: Mod with assorted features for play.mlum.io
body:
A mod that makes some parts of playing on `play.mlum.io` better.

### Features:
- Combat timer, notifications when out of combat, displays time on actionbar
- Low dura rod notifications
- Red contra tooltip
- Chocolate grind stats tool (calculate chocolate earned and choco/min)
- View iteminfo for any item
- Escape announcer ("esc" or "escape" in chat) 
- Timers for tasks with cooldowns (trash bags, contra box, etc.)
- Combat stats tracker to keep track of kills, damage dealt, types of guards killed
- Custom mlum capes and cape selector
- Style meter for combat (like ultrakill)
- Crafting material in-tooltip checklist
- Chat selector above chat box
- Custom bm GUI
- Guard slot notifications
- Job progress tracker (4/11 rakes, etc)

### Requirements:
- Fabric API
- Mod Menu
- Cloth Config API
